Great, this looks even better.
Notice the large_scale test failed on https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/f3e66685-0743-470c-b34f-e9c0c75a89a7
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/large-scale.sh: MDSRATE must be set
I think large-scale.sh failed to find mdsrate under the new location.

Patch Set 4:

and please add testgroup=regression-mpi so we can run the mpitests from the new location

Patch Set 5:

thanks, I expect a few more iterations since we haven't tests all mpi tests yet (ie ior...)

commit.subject: LU-12395 build: build mpitests for el8
commit.message:
LU-12395 build: build mpitests for el8

RHEL8 has rpm-mpi-hooks which requires binaries
to be in specific mpi bin to generate the correct
requires

See https://fedoraproject.org//wiki/Changes/RpmMPIReqProv
and https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Packaging:MPI

Test-Parameters: trivial clientdistro=el8 serverdistro=el7.6 testgroup=regression-mpi
